facebook.caption:
4.9 stars. 99 reviews. Inside a Venice-themed street in Phú Quốc.

Cafe Juliet & Pastries sits in Sunset Town and the photos alone will make you reroute your whole day. Coffee, pastries, and architecture that looks nothing like the rest of the island.

If you're already heading to Sunset Town for the views, add 30 minutes here. You'll thank yourself.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Walking through Venice 07 Sunset Town and stumbling into Cafe Juliet & Pastries. 4.9 stars, 99 reviews, pastries in hand. This is what a detour looks like in Phu Quoc.

Cafe Juliet & Pastries is the detour worth taking.
